sections.paragraph:
Original: טירה

Transliteration: ṭı̂yrâh

Phonetic: tee-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. encampment, battlement
    1. encampment, tent camp
    2. walled dwelling places, battlement (metaphorically)
    3. row (of stones)

Origin: from (an equivalent to) H2905

TWOT entry: 798b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
